thought.text: I see - I can't include lexer rules in the parser grammar. Those are already defined in SYsULexer.g4. Let me remove the lexer rules from the parser grammar:

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "head -252 /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 > /tmp/parser_head.g4 && mv /tmp/parser_head.g4 /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Remove lexer rules from parser grammar"}

summary: Remove lexer rules from parser grammar
